title: YBK Tech Morris Style Ceramic Cup and Saucer Set, 9oz Teacup with Saucer- Birds and Floral Pattern (Black)
features: The ceramic cup and saucer is of good quality, wth morris pattern, it looks very novelty and classic.
Soft lines and noble temperament, good for table, kitchen and garden decoration.
The cup can store about 260ml liquid, widely used for tea, coffee, beverages, etc.
Comes in sturdy cardboard gift packaging, including a cup, a saucer and a spoon.
description: YBK Tech Ceramic Cup and Saucer Set, 9oz Teacup with Saucer, Christmas Series Introduction : The ceramic cup and saucer set is exquisitely designed. With good workmanship, it’s of very good quality. There are various patterns for you to choose from. They can be the perfect gift for parents, friends, leaders as well as those tea lovers. Features: * Strengthen porcelain, healthy and durable. * It’s conform to the china national standard, environmentally friendly. * Different patterns for you to choose from, novelty and classic. * Morris style, special and stylish. Specifications : Patterns: birds and floral Cup volume: 260ml Cup size:11cm(Length) * 5.5cm (Height) Saucer diameter: 16.4cm Tips: *The volume is around 260ml, neither big nor too small, please check the size before buying. Thank you! * Slight flaw may exist in single product as they are handicraft products. Don’t worry; it is not a quality issue. * Dishwasher safe, microwave safe. Package includes: 1* Cup 1* Saucer 1* Spoon
